_comment: The Chrome logon sample in that folder is not itself scored as a bad finding here; the expected bad facts are the log clear, service install, and WMI execution leads.
Local-only until upstream EVTX sample provenance is documented.
source_url: local-only EVTX attack-sample training folder; raw fixtures not redistributed
license: VERDICT-authored answer key; raw EVTX provenance must be verified before publishing or redistributing the fixtures

findings.description: Windows Security audit log was cleared, producing Event ID 1102 anti-forensics evidence
EVTX EID 7045 records installation of service spoolfool with image cmd.exe
findings.artifact_hint: LM_Remote_Service02_7045.evtx contains EID 7045 service-install evidence for spoolfool cmd.exe

findings.description: Remote WMI process execution appears in Security Event ID 4688 with WmiPrvSE.exe as the parent process
findings.artifact_hint: LM_WMI_4624_4688_TargetHost.evtx contains WmiPrvSE-parent process creation and network logon context
